transcript: Speaker A: You're welcome. Stop saying 'You're welcome', it's very basic! Speaker B: Oh, what should I say instead? Speaker A: You can say 'no problem', 'anytime' or 'happy to help'. That sounds more natural. Speaker B: That sounds better... but how do I improve more? Speaker A: That's exactly what I'm here for. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. Speaker B: I can practice with you? Speaker A: Yes! I'll chat with you, give you instant feedback on your pronunciation, and help you sound more natural. Speaker B: But I make a lot of mistakes. Speaker A: That's totally okay. I'll guide you through them step by step. Speaker B: Sounds good! Speaker A: Let's practice together every day and you'll see how quickly your English improves.

summary: An AI avatar corrects a human speaker's basic English phrasing and introduces Loora, an AI English tutor app. The ad highlights features like real-time pronunciation feedback and conversational practice to build confidence.
